text: Moving between these two spaces, I am struck by the contrast—on one side, a glass-walled meeting evokes a sense of diligent organization, people collaborating quietly within the transparent boundary. On the other, I find myself drawn toward a vivid wall of creative energy, research, and invention. The bold letters R+D invite curiosity and awe. Here, I feel ideas coming to life, progress made tangible. I feel slightly like a wanderer between worlds: participant in the routine, observer of innovation. It both grounds me and expands my sense of possibility.
